name: Brian Williams
abstract: Brian Douglas Williams (born May 5, 1959) is an American journalist and television news anchor. He was a correspondent for NBC Nightly News starting in 1993, before his promotion to anchor and managing editor of the broadcast in December 2004.

concerts.label: Wait Wait...Don't Tell Me! The NPR News Quiz Live
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Ellis Marsalis
about_quotes.evidence: You know the cat on the NBC News, Brian Williams? He went to three different junior colleges.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ellis Marsalis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
